questions.question: What is the purpose of gas in the Ethereum blockchain?
keyPoints: Requires a fee for every transaction and contract execution
Determines the priority of the transaction or contract execution

questions.question: How does the gas limit affect the execution of a smart contract?
keyPoints: Determines the maximum amount of gas that can be used
If exceeded, the execution will fail
Any remaining gas will be refunded

questions.question: Explain how gas is used in the Ethereum blockchain, including the gas price and gas limit.
keyPoints: Gas is used to prevent denial-of-service (DoS) attacks
Gas price determines the priority of the transaction or contract execution
Gas limit determines the maximum amount of gas that can be used
If the gas limit is exceeded, the execution will fail
Any remaining gas will be refunded

questions.question: What is the unit of measurement for gas in the Ethereum blockchain?
Explain how the gas cost is calculated for a transaction or contract execution, including the gas price and gas used.
keyPoints: Gas cost is calculated by multiplying the gas price by the amount of gas used
Any remaining gas will be refunded
Gas price determines the priority of the transaction or contract execution
Gas used determines the amount of gas consumed
